title: Blocky Game
description: Public test of my retro styled horror modpack
body:
# Welcome to the Blocky Game
___________________________________________________________
**Submerge into the classic pre-alpha minecraft world like in good old days but..... something is wrong i feel watched Hello? Is anyone there?**

Modpack tries to repeat the classic pre-alpha look of old minecraft, modpack isnt intended to be played in multiplayer! Its made for long-term survival for around 7 minecraft days or maybe more. In case you dont feel scared or just it seems lame i recommend to use shaders but overall it should be scary enough
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
There are such mods as: ITS NOT REAL and From The Caves

</details>

~~**Watch out....**~~
![sky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e24709a396be7d8b0d4acfce82802ed63f51ccc2.png)

I DO NOT KNOWN OR TAKE CREDIT FOR ANY MODS BEING USED - All credit to the mods goes to the mod creators which can be found in the mod list. 

Might do few updates on this one its not finished yet so its for Public Test

Feel free to text me on my discord in case you have problems or ideas to add!

Credits: brguiireal [Creator of ITS NOT REAL mod], mininotprime [Creator of From The Caves mods]
